description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a vibrant and playful color scheme. The front panel displays a large screen, a marquee labeled 'Monty's Gator Golf' with cartoonish green and purple graphics, and a control panel with two buttons and a joystick. The side panels are decorated with lush, jungle-themed artwork, including a purple gator, a golf flag, water, and tropical foliage, enhancing its whimsical appeal. The lower front section includes a coin slot and access panel, typical of arcade machines. The top and trim are highlighted in purple, while the back is solid black with a green top surface. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood and plastic, with metal components for the coin mechanism and internal electronics.
description: A colorful upright arcade game cabinet with jungle-themed artwork, a marquee reading 'Monty's Gator Golf', and a control panel featuring a joystick and buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marquee, large screen, control panel with joystick and buttons, and coin slot.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying detailed jungle artwork with a purple gator, golf flag, and lush greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain black back panel with a green top surface and no visible artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring jungle-themed graphics with a gator, water, golf ball, and tropical plants.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two round buttons, spaced apart, with a dark panel and colored controls.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'Monty's Gator Golf' in playful green and white letters with a cartoon gator and jungle foliage, set on a black and purple background.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels are decorated with vibrant jungle-themed artwork, including a purple gator, golf flag, water, tropical plants, and playful cartoon elements.
